NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS ON PLTF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES (LIBEL AND SLANDER); MEMORANDUM OF P/A;, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS ON PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES (LIBEL AND SLANDER). ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED, WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PARAGRAPH 18 OF THE AMENDED COMPLAINT AND ATTACHED EXHIBITS ARE INSUFFICIENT AS A MATTER OF LAW TO PLEAD COMPLIANCE WITH THE GOVERNMENT CLAIMS ACT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.(302/CWW)JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR 5797
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUFF, RAYMOND R. TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On Pltf'S First Amended Complaint For Damages (Libel And Slander); Memorandum Of P/A;
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion For Judgment on the Pleadings on Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint for Damages (Libel And Slander). Appearances: Raymond Huff, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing and opposing party; Larry Hecimovich, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3933 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Paragraph 18 of the Amended Complaint and attached exhibits are insufficient as a matter of law to plead compliance with the Government Claims Act. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings On The Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion for Judgment on The Pleadings. Appearances: Raymond R. Huff, Appearing as Plaintiff in Pro Per, and opposing party; Larry Hecimovich, Esq. Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3933, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Hearing held. The Court adopted and modified its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
